headline: Qorvo® to Distribute Quarterly Earnings on July 28, 2026
summary: GREENSBORO, N.C., July 15, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Qorvo® (Nasdaq: QRVO), a leading global provider of connectivity and power solutions, will distribute fiscal 2027 first quarter financial results at approximately 4:00 p.m. (ET) on Tuesday, July 28, 2026. The press release will be available on the Company's Investor Relations website at the following URL: https://ir.qorvo.com (under “Financial Releases”). headline: Skyworks Sets Date for Third Quarter Fiscal 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
summary: July 28 at 4:30 p.m. EDTIRVINE, Calif., July 15, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Skyworks Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: SWKS), an innovator of high-performance analog and mixed-signal semiconductors connecting people, places and things, will host a conference call with analysts to discuss its third quarter fiscal 2026 results and business outlook on July 28, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. EDT. headline: Can Cirrus Logic's PC Business Sustain Strong Growth in 2027?
summary: CRUS is expanding its PC business with SDCA adoption, mainstream device wins and AI-focused audio products, setting up another year of growth in fiscal 2027.

headline: Skyworks Solutions Earnings Preview: What to Expect
summary: Skyworks Solutions will release its third-quarter earnings soon, and analysts anticipate a double-digit profit dip.
